title: iberis ciliata subsp. pruitii
intro: Iberis ciliata subsp. pruitii, also known as the rock cress, is a flowering plant species in the family Brassicaceae. It is used in herbal medicine for its purported medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Iberis ciliata subsp. pruitii are said to include reducing inflammation, fighting infection, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and tinctures, are used to treat various health conditions, but more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
